titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5955

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=786 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.803383+00 | translation moa=787 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 13:36:57.813496+00

div.p:
Omnibus Christi fidelibus ad quos presens scriptum peruenerit  Bertramus de parua Ristona Salutem . Nouerit uniuersitas uestra me dedisse . concessisse . et hac
mea presenti carta confirmasse deo et sancto Cudberto et Anketino Prior et Conuentui de Coldingham homagium et seruicum Patricii filii Vtredi
cum omnibus terris et possessionibus quas habuit ex donacionem Ade patris mei in uilla et in teritorio parue Ristone . scilicet . Toftum et croftum que
iacent iuxta terram Henrici uersus orientem et quatuor decim acras iuxta Wambenese crosse . et tres rodas in Blakeclou . et duas acras et
dimidiam iuxta Blakeclou uersus orientem . et octo acras iuxta Faules . habendas et tenendas dictis Priori et Conuentui et eorum succes
soribus in perpetuum . quietas de me et heredibus meis absque omni consuetudine et exaccione seculari et demanda sicut aliqua elemosina infra regnum
Scocie melius uel liberius tenetur uel possidetur . Ego uero Bertramus et heredes mei predictum homagium et seruicium cum omnibus terris et posses
sionibus prescriptis Priori et Conuentui et eorum successoribus contra omnes homines et feminas warantizabimus et defendemus inperpetuum .
in cuius rei testimonium presenti scripto sigillum meum apposui . Hiis testibus domino Willelmo de Lindesey . domino Willelmo de Morgintona .
domino Alano de Swintona . Thomas de Nesebite . Willelmo de Scremerstona . Ada de Prenderghest . Dauid . de Lummesdene . Roberto
filio Gregorii . Gilberto de Lummesdene . Ada filio Iohannis de Aytona . Ada Franzais . Iohanne filio Ingerani et aliis .

p.cl: To all Christ's faithful to whom the present writing shall come, Bertram of Little Reston sends greeting.

to have given, granted, and by this my present charter to have made firm, to God and to Saint Cuthbert, and to Anketin the Prior, and the Convent of Coldingham, the homage and service of Patrick son of Uhtred, with all lands and possessions which he had out of the donation of Adam, my father, in the toun and territory of Little Reston; that is, the toft and croft which lies near the land of Henry towards the east, and fourteen acres of land near Wambenese Cross, and three roods in Blakeclou, and two acres and a half near Blakeclou towards the east, and eight acres near Faules; for the Prior and Convent and their successors to have and to hold for ever, quit in respect of me and my heirs, without any custom and secular exaction and demand, just as any alms within the kingdom of Scotland is well and freely held and possessed. I, Bertram, and my heirs, shall warrant and defend for ever the aforesaid homage and service for the Prior and Convent and their successors, with all the lands and possessions written before, against all men and women.
In testimony of this matter, I have applied my seal to the present writing.

With these witnesses: the lord William of Lindsay; the lord William of Mordington; the lord Alan of Swinton; Thomas of Nisbet; William of Scremerston; Adam of Prenderguest; David of Lumsdaine; Robert son of Gregory; Gilbert of Lumsdaine; Adam son of John of Ayton; Adam Francis; John son of Ingram; and others.
